{% block docs_sidebar %} {% if theme_navbar_center or theme_navbar_end or sidebars or theme_primary_sidebar_end %}
{% if theme_navbar_center %}
{% for navbar_item in theme_navbar_center %} {% with theme_header_links_before_dropdown=999 %}
{% include navbar_item %}
{% endwith %} {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% if theme_navbar_end %}
{% for navbar_item in theme_navbar_end %}
{% include navbar_item %}
{% endfor %}
{% endif %}
{# Always render the nav tree regardless of RTD addon interference #}
{% include "sidebar-nav-bs.html" %}
{%- for sidebartemplate in theme_primary_sidebar_end %}
{%- include sidebartemplate %}
{%- endfor %}
{% endif %} {% endblock docs_sidebar %}
